sessionStart.bash: if [ -f .planning/STATE.md ]; then printf '%s' '{"additionalContext":"GSD: .planning/STATE.md present - review the current phase and any blockers before acting."}'; else printf '%s' '{"additionalContext":"GSD: no .planning/ workflow found - run /gsd-new-project to start a tracked workflow."}'; fi
sessionStart.powershell: if (Test-Path .planning/STATE.md) { '{"additionalContext":"GSD: .planning/STATE.md present - review the current phase and any blockers before acting."}' } else { '{"additionalContext":"GSD: no .planning/ workflow found - run /gsd-new-project to start a tracked workflow."}' }

preToolUse.bash: printf '%s' '{"additionalContext":"GSD: confirm this tool use is in scope for the active phase before proceeding."}'
preToolUse.powershell: '{"additionalContext":"GSD: confirm this tool use is in scope for the active phase before proceeding."}'

postToolUse.bash: printf '%s' '{"additionalContext":"GSD: review the tool result against the active phase before continuing."}'
postToolUse.powershell: '{"additionalContext":"GSD: review the tool result against the active phase before continuing."}'

userPromptSubmitted.bash: printf '%s' '{"additionalContext":"GSD: check this request against .planning/STATE.md scope before acting."}'
userPromptSubmitted.powershell: '{"additionalContext":"GSD: check this request against .planning/STATE.md scope before acting."}'

sessionEnd.bash: printf '%s' '{"additionalContext":"GSD: update .planning/STATE.md with the session outcome before ending."}'
sessionEnd.powershell: '{"additionalContext":"GSD: update .planning/STATE.md with the session outcome before ending."}'
